subject: [RFC PATCH v2 3/7] mm, swap: support physical swap as a vswap backend

reviews.author: Yosry Ahmed
reviews.summary: Reviewer expressed mild disappointment and suggested adding a comment to explain why erase is not necessary for the vswap case, indicating that they are not strongly opposed but want clarification
reviews.raw_body:
Yeah :/

Maybe just add a comment why no erase is needed for the vswap case.

2026-06-24.patch_summary: This patch modifies zswap_entry_load() and zswap_entry_store() functions to handle physical swap as a vswap backend, specifically addressing the 'erase' operation which is asymmetric in its handling of non-vswap cases.

2026-06-25.patch_summary: This patch modifies zswap_entry_load() and zswap_entry_store() functions to handle physical swap as a vswap backend, specifically addressing the 'erase' operation which is asymmetric in its handling of non-vswap cases.
